SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AddEntityCommand
Command to add a new entity of the specified type at the given position.
AxialMold
An abstract mold whose propagation pattern is axial (only along the cardinal axes).
AxialMold1
A concrete axial mold type (AxialMold1) with specific growth and death parameters.
CanAge
Trait for entities that age and can die over time.
CanAttack
Trait for entities that can perform an attack action.
CanDefend
Trait for entities that provide defensive capability.
CanGrow
Trait interface for objects that can grow over time.
CanPropagate
Trait interface for objects that can propagate to neighboring cells or locations.
Cell
A grid cell used by the simulation to represent a discrete location.
CircMold1
A simple mold that grows slowly and has a low probability of propagation.
CircularMold
An abstract mold whose propagation pattern is circular (all directions within Manhattan distance 1 to 3).
ClearEntitiesCommand
Command to remove all entities from the cell at ClearEntitiesCommand.position().
CombatSystem
Simple combat resolution system executed per-cell.
Command
Marker interface for parsed input commands.
CommandType
Enumeration of the supported input commands.
ConsoleMain
Console-based entry point for running the simulation loop.
ConsoleMain.SimulationRun
Small holder describing a running simulation: the thread, the state and the loop.
ConsoleRenderSystem
Handles console rendering of the simulation state.
CoorWeight
A simple record to hold a coordinate and its associated weight for propagation purposes.
DecreaseSpeedCommand
Command to decrease the simulation speed by one unit.
Displayable
Interface for those who are to be displayed (means printed)
DividedMold1
A concrete mold that propagates by splitting its growth between itself and the target cell.
DrawingController
Controller responsible for building and handling drawing/tool UI elements.
Entities
Enumeration of available entity types used by the simulation.
Entity
Base type for objects that can be placed into a Cell.
GraphController
Controller for the population and infected LineCharts in the UI.
Grid
Represents a 2D grid composed of cells for a simulation.
GridController
Controller that renders the simulation grid as a grid of rectangles and forwards mouse actions to the input command queue according to the currently selected `UiState` tool.
HelloApplication
JavaFX application entry point that boots an initialization dialog, starts the simulation and loads the main UI.
HelloController
Main controller for the simulation window layout.
IncreaseSpeedCommand
Command to increase the simulation speed by one unit.
InitController
Controller for the initialization screen of the simulation.
InitController.ValidationHandler
Callback interface that receives the validated simulation parameters.
InputHandler
Consumes raw input strings and applies the matching command to the SimulationState.
InputParser
Utilities for parsing textual console commands into structured command objects used by the input subsystem.
InputReader
Background reader that continuously consumes lines from standard input and enqueues them for the input handling subsystem.
Launcher
 
LoadCommand
Command representing a request to load a saved simulation from the given file path.
Material
Material types used to describe cell substrates.
Mold
Abstract base class for mold entities used in the simulation.
NeedsGraphValues
Interface for controllers that receive aggregated graph values from the simulation.
NeedsSimulationState
Interface for controllers that need access to the shared SimulationState.
NeedsUiState
Interface for controllers that need the UI selection/state model injected.
PauseCommand
Command toggling the paused state of the simulation.
PropagationSystem
Responsible for selecting propagation targets and performing propagation actions for CanPropagate entities.
ProximalMold
An abstract mold whose propagation targets are the immediate neighbours (Manhattan distance 1 or 2).
RandomController
Controller for the "Random" pane that places a user-specified number of entities or materials at random positions on the grid.
RectangleEntityCommand
Command to fill a rectangular area (inclusive) with entities of the specified type.
RectangleMaterialCommand
Command to fill a rectangular area (inclusive) with the provided material.
RemoveEntityCommand
Command to remove one entity of the specified type at the given position.
SaveCommand
Command to save the current simulation to the given file path.
SaveController
Controller providing save/load UI actions for the simulation.
SaveSystem
Utility for serializing and deserializing the grid to disk.
SetMaterialCommand
Command to set the material at the specified position.
SimulationLoop
Controls and runs the main simulation loop.
SimulationState
Encapsulates the mutable state of the simulation.
SpeedCommand
Command representing a direct speed set request.
StepCommand
Command to advance the simulation a fixed number of steps.
TimeController
Controller for the time control panel of the simulation UI.
ToolsType
 
UiState
Holds the mutable UI state shared between the simulation canvas and toolbars.
UpdateSimulationSystem
System responsible for advancing the simulation state by one tick.
Vec2
Immutable 2D integer vector used for grid coordinates.
